description: The LegacyTextField component was used to edit text in old content migrated from other platforms. This component should not be used in new content, and should be replaced whenever possible.

fields.Color: The color of the UI elements.
fields.Slant: How beveled the UI elements should be.
fields._textSlot: The slot of the text visual of this UI element.
fields._textRenderer: The text renderer of this UI element.
fields._textEditor: The text editor that allows direct editing of the value this UI element controls.
fields._textBounds: The field to drive with the bounds of the text to keep the UI around it.
fields._colliderSize: The field to drive with what the size of this UI's collider should be.
fields._meshLeft: The mesh of the left button.
fields._meshRight: The mesh of the right button.
fields._textLeftBounds: The field to drive with the bounds of the text on the left button so the UI stays wrapped around it.
fields._textRightBounds: The field to drive with the bounds of the text on the right button so the UI stays wrapped around it.
fields._leftTextRenderer: The text renderer of the left button.
fields._rightTextRenderer: The text renderer of the right button.
fields._colliderLeftSize: The field to drive with what the size of the left collider should be.
fields._colliderRightSize: The field to drive with what the size of the right collider should be.
fields._leftOffset: The field to drive with what the offset of the left collider should be.
fields._rightOffset: The field to drive with what the offset of the right collider should be.
fields._leftTextPosition: The field to drive wiyh what the position of the text on the left button should be.
fields._rightTextPosition: The field to drive wiyh what the position of the text on the right button should be.
fields._hintTextRenderer: the text renderer of the edit text hint
fields._hintTextBounds: the field to drive with the bounds of the hint text for keeping a UI wrapped around it.
fields._hintTextEnabled: Whether the hint text should be enabled or not.

methods.OnLeftTouched: Called when the left button is touched.
methods.OnRightTouched: Called when the right button is touched.
